name: Publish Package (NuGet Push Only)
description: Publishes NuGet packages to a specified NuGet or package source. No GitHub release is created. Designed for universal use and workflow reusability.

artifact_name.description: Name of the NuGet artifact to download (e.g., nuget-packages)

package_pattern.description: Glob pattern for .nupkg files to publish

NUGET_API_KEY.description: API key for publishing to the NuGet/package source

usage:
jobs:
  publish-nuget-push:
    uses: rmnavz/github-actions/.github/workflows/publish-package-nuget-push.yml@v1.0.0
    with:
      artifact_name: 'nuget-packages'
      package_pattern: '**/*.nupkg'
      nuget_source: 'https://api.nuget.org/v3/index.json'
